author: Fuxia
title: Raw Ping
rules: "Normal Sudoku rules apply.\nDigits on thermometers increase strictly from the bulb end.\nDigits separated by a V sum to 5, digits separated by an X sum to 10. Not all possible Vs and Xes are given."
